name: JoAi: Delete Skill

description.en: Permanently remove a skill from your agent.
description.de: Entferne eine Fähigkeit dauerhaft von deinem Agenten.
description.es: Permanently remove a skill from your agent.
description.fr: Permanently remove a skill from your agent.
description.ro: Permanently remove a skill from your agent.
description.it: Permanently remove a skill from your agent.

bot: Use this when the user wants to remove a skill their agent no longer needs. If the user refers to a skill by name, list skills first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Skill ID

description.en: The ID of the skill to delete
description.de: Die ID der zu löschenden Fähigkeit
description.es: The ID of the skill to delete
description.fr: The ID of the skill to delete
description.ro: The ID of the skill to delete
description.it: The ID of the skill to delete

inputs.bot: The skill hash ID. If the user refers to a skill by name, list skills first to find the matching ID.
